summary: Workflow-integrity layer (stage-proposal + UserPromptSubmit resolver + workflow gates in write-to-context) and three write-to-context hardenings (filename whitelist, proposed-mode-dicts-only, operator-requires-1.0).
notes: Breaking for workspaces where skills hand-build write-to-context args with loose shell escaping (corrupted paths now rejected), or where proposed mode was used on scalars/arrays (rejected — use direct mode, metadata is preserved in event log). Workflow gates only activate for writes to products/spec, products/offers, audiences/profile — other paths unaffected. After install, run validate-resources per brand and rebuild manifests.

changes.note: CLI. Writes proposal to brands/{slug}/.workflow.json under `pending`. Checkpoints: confirmed_products (per-product), audience_q1q4_answered. Dedupe: one pending at a time per brand.
UserPromptSubmit hook. Matches confirm/reject regexes (FR+EN) against the literal operator message, promotes or clears the pending, appends to history. Hook input is user text → agents cannot fake.
Adds UserPromptSubmit hook entry pointing at checkpoint-resolver.py. Keeps existing convention-guard + mutation-guard PreToolUse entries.

WORKFLOW_GATES added (products/{slug}/spec.json + offers.json → confirmed_products; audiences/*/profile.json → audience_q1q4_answered; source=operator bypass). ALLOWED_PATH_PATTERNS whitelist for target filenames. mode=proposed now rejects non-dict values. source=operator requires confidence=1.0. Gate block messages include ready-to-run stage-proposal command.
Step 1 Hero and Step 5B Audience now document the stage-proposal.py call before asking the operator. New Hard Rule: Stage before asking — always. Gate-block behavior documented.

post_steps: For each active brand: no .workflow.json creation needed — it's auto-created on first stage-proposal.py call.
Any custom skill that writes to products/*/spec.json, products/*/offers.json, or audiences/*/profile.json MUST stage a proposal first or the write will be blocked.
